---
title: "ONT_sim"
author: "Mona Taouk"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

setwd("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofMelbourne/2025(Ingle_Postdoc)/ONT_read_simulator/ONT-Read-Simulator-Benchmarking")

data <- read.csv("all_tools_stats.tsv", sep = "\t")

```

## 

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = read_length, weight = read_length, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Read length (bp)",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read length distribution per simulation tool"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100000))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = actual_identity, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage identity",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read identities"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_qscore, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Q-score",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Q-score"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
